goal: converges_to(a, x) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = converges_to(x0, x1) }(a, x)

goal: e.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, e) }
proof: (forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, x0) } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { not tail_bound(a, x, x1, x0) }) }(e)

goal: eps.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, eps) }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, x0) } }(eps)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, eps) }
exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, x, k0, eps) }

proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Nat, x3: Real, x4: Nat) { not tail_bound(x0, x1, x2, x3) or not x2 <= x4 or x0(x4).is_close(x1, x3) }(a, x, big_n, eps, big_n)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, w0) }
function(x0: Real) { not forall(x1: Nat) { a(x1) ∈ s } or not converges_to(a, x) or not x0.is_positive or is_eps_adherent_to_set(s, x, x0) }(w0)
